_publications._publicationTitle: Perspectives of Patients and Providers on Chronic Pain Assessment in Neurofibromatosis Type 1 (NF1): A Qualitative Study.

_contextSnippet: those with moderate to severe depression or severe anxiety (i.e., scores of >15 on either measure) were excluded...the mean score for anxiety on the GAD-7 was 10.7 (SD, 1.1; range, 0 - 14)
details: Mean anxiety score was 10.7 (SD 1.1, range 0-14) used for excluding participants with severe anxiety (scores >15)
